biography:
Chris Walley is an Irish actor best known for his role as Jock O'Keeffe in the 2016 Irish comedy film The Young Offenders for which he received an IFTA Nomination for Best Actor in a Supporting Role - Film.

In 2018, he will reprise his role as Jock O'Keeffe in a TV series of the same name created by the BBC.
name: Chris Walley
